name: Composio
description: Access 1000+ third-party tools via Composio (Gmail, Slack, GitHub, Notion, etc.)

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Composio integration

apiKey.description: Your Composio API key (ak_...) from app.composio.dev/developers — enables per-user tool router sessions

userId.description: Optional user ID for per-user Composio sessions (used with API key)

enabled.label: Enable Composio

apiKey.help: Your Composio API key (ak_...) from app.composio.dev/developers — enables per-user tool router sessions

userId.label: User ID
